mapper.select: select * from ${tableName} order by id desc
mapper.update: update internal_products set master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from customer_orders where order_no=#{orderNo}
select * from customer_orders where order_no=#{orderNo} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}
select * from supplier_submissions where id=#{id}
select * from unmatched_customer_items where id=#{id}
select * from customer_order_items where id=#{id}
select * from customer_products where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}
select * from customer_products where id=#{id}
select * from internal_products where id=#{id}
select * from internal_products where code=#{code} order by id limit 1
select * from supplier_submissions where ifnull(spec_model, '')=#{specModel} and supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id limit 1
select * from master_products where code=#{code} order by id limit 1
select * from master_products where code=#{code} and supplier_username is not null and supplier_username!=''
select * from supplier_submissions where code=#{code} and supplier_username is not null and supplier_username!='' and status='APPROVED'
select * from customer_order_items where order_no=#{orderNo} and code is not null and code!='' and (status is null or status!='CANCELLED')
select * from customer_order_items where order_no=#{orderNo} order by id
select * from supplier_submissions where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id desc
select * from supplier_quotes where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} order by id desc

select min(id) id, order_no, customer_username, case when sum(case when status='WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'WAIT_SUPPLIER_PRICE' else 'SUPPLIER_PRICED' end status, max(created_at) created_at, max(updated_at) updated_at from supplier_quotes where supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} group by order_no, customer_username order by max(id) desc

select q.id, q.order_no, q.customer_item_id, q.customer_username, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, i.new_code, i.series, i.brand, i.color, i.category, i.craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, i.common_model, i.size_value, i.resolution, i.model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and q.order_no=#{orderNo} order by q.id

select q.id, q.order_no, q.customer_item_id, q.customer_username, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, i.new_code, i.series, i.brand, i.color, i.category, i.craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, i.common_model, i.size_value, i.resolution, i.model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.supplier_username=#{supplierUsername} and q.order_no=#{orderNo} order by q.id

select q.id, q.order_no, q.customer_item_id, q.customer_username, q.supplier_username, coalesce(q.code, i.code) code, i.new_code, i.series, i.brand, i.color, i.category, i.craft_material, coalesce(q.spec_model, i.spec_model) spec_model, i.common_model, i.size_value, i.resolution, i.model_remark, q.purchase_price, q.sale_price, q.status, q.pricing_status, q.created_at, q.updated_at from supplier_quotes q left join customer_order_items i on q.customer_item_id=i.id where q.status='SUPPLIER_PRICED' order by q.id desc
select * from customer_orders where customer_username=#{customerUsername} order by id desc
select * from internal_products order by id desc
mapper.update: update customer_orders set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
update customer_order_items set status='CANCELLED', updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}
update customer_order_items set purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id}
update customer_orders set status='QUOTE_GENERATED', updated_at=current_timestamp where order_no=#{orderNo}

update customer_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{id} and customer_username=#{customerUsername}

update customer_order_items set code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, master_product_id=#{masterProductId}, matched=true, status='ACTIVE', updated_at=current_timestamp where customer_username=#{customerUsername} and ifnull(spec_model, '')=ifnull(#{specModel}, '') and ifnull(common_model, '')=ifnull(#{commonModel}, '') and (matched=false or ifnull(code, '')='')
mapper.select: select * from supplier_quotes where id=#{id}
mapper.update: update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, customer_username=#{customerUsername}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{masterProductId}

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where source_type='SUPPLIER' and code=#{code} and spec_model=#{specModel} and supplier_username=#{supplierUsername}

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where source_type='CUSTOMER_MATCH' and code=#{code} and spec_model=#{specModel} and customer_username=#{customerUsername} and (order_no=#{orderNo} or #{orderNo} is null)

update master_products set series=#{series}, brand=#{brand}, code=#{code}, new_code=#{newCode}, color=#{color}, category=#{category}, craft_material=#{craftMaterial}, spec_model=#{specModel}, common_model=#{commonModel}, size_value=#{sizeValue}, resolution=#{resolution}, model_remark=#{modelRemark}, sale_price=#{salePrice}, purchase_price=#{purchasePrice}, updated_at=current_timestamp where id=#{masterProductId}
